text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We have a lot of events here at Tracen,<n>so it's
important to keep up with the<n>postings on the
bulletin board.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Obviously different competitive events<n>are listed,
but they'll add information<n>about recreational
events too.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If any of them catch your eye, it might<n>make for a
nice change of pace—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah! D-don't get it twisted! I'm not sayingI want to go with you, got it?!
